standards_version.source_note: This IM1 readiness pack is versioned against the official NHS England Digital IM1 and SCAL pages reviewed on 2026-04-14. The live onboarding route can change, so the pack stores the review date and source list explicitly instead of baking a timeless assumption into the repo.

official_sources.title: IM1 Pairing integration
official_sources.summary: Confirms IM1 remains a live route, states there are no current plans to decommission it, names Optum and TPP as the current foundation system providers, and separates provider mock API, supported test, assurance, live, and RFC change handling.

official_sources.title: IM1 prerequisites form
official_sources.summary: Defines the current public IM1 Clinical and Information Governance prerequisites form fields and makes clear that all fields are mandatory.

official_sources.title: Supplier Conformance Assessment List (SCAL)
official_sources.summary: Defines SCAL as the document-based assurance route, one SCAL per product, with supplier and product information plus one or more service-specific tabs.

official_sources.title: SCAL user guide
official_sources.summary: Explains the current typical SCAL start sequence, including DSPT, clinical safety, medical device review, technical and security tests, and submission plus connection agreement.

official_sources.title: Interface mechanisms guidance
official_sources.summary: Confirms supplier-specific API suites, Optum and TPP scope, the role of the Pairing Integration Pack (PIP), and that functionality varies by provider supplier.

gaps.title: Named IM1 submitter, sponsor, approver, and legal signatory chain is not fixed
gaps.required_prerequisite: Named human owners for real portal submission and agreement execution
gaps.notes: Mock-now work uses placeholders only; no real submission may proceed until the named owner chain exists.

gaps.title: Optum (EMISWeb) provider-specific PIP and compatibility evidence is still pending
gaps.required_prerequisite: Accepted feasibility review plus supplier-specific PIP
gaps.notes: Do not claim Optum-specific functionality beyond the simulator-backed baseline until the real provider pack exists.

gaps.title: TPP (SystmOne) provider-specific PIP and compatibility evidence is still pending
gaps.required_prerequisite: Accepted feasibility review plus supplier-specific PIP
gaps.notes: Do not claim TPP-specific functionality beyond the simulator-backed baseline until the real provider pack exists.

gaps.title: DSPT pack still carries a stale par_121 prerequisite blocker
gaps.required_prerequisite: Refresh DSPT evidence so IM1 clinical and IG statements do not depend on a stale blocker
gaps.notes: This task does not rewrite par_122 outputs in place. It records the stale dependency explicitly so actual IM1 submission cannot pretend the DSPT chain is already current.

gaps.title: Stage-one SCAL and supplier compatibility review remain externally gated
gaps.required_prerequisite: Prerequisites confirmed and stage-one SCAL issued by NHS England
gaps.notes: The repo can prepare now, but stage-one SCAL issuance and compatibility review are still external triggers.

gaps.title: Model Interface Licence execution cannot proceed because named legal signatories are still pending
gaps.required_prerequisite: Named legal signatories and approved licence review path
gaps.notes: Licence readiness is modeled now with placeholders only; do not imply execution readiness.

gaps.title: Supported-test and assurance entry criteria are not yet fully met
gaps.required_prerequisite: Completed SCAL, provider mock or unsupported test evidence, and explicit target environment
gaps.notes: Supported test, assurance, and live remain separate gates. None may be implied from simulator success.

gaps.title: AI or other material functional change must reopen the IM1 pack via RFC and refreshed SCAL
gaps.required_prerequisite: Updated SCAL, refreshed hazard log, refreshed DPIA, and other associated documentation
gaps.notes: This is not a current blocker for bounded mock-now engineering, but it must stay explicit in the real pairing path.
